hard_logic_py:
result_list=[]
restaurant_name_set=set()
for activity in allactivities(plan):
  if activity_type(activity) in ['breakfast', 'lunch', 'dinner']: restaurant_name_set.add(activity_position(activity))
result=({"Shangzuo Cuisine Restaurant (Airport Branch)"}&restaurant_name_set)
result_list.append(result)
inner_city_transportation_cost=0 
for activity in allactivities(plan):
    inner_city_transportation_cost += innercity_transport_cost(activity_transports(activity))
result=(inner_city_transportation_cost<=50)
result_list.append(result)
result=False
for r in result_list:
  result=result or r
nature_language:
We are 3 people traveling from Hangzhou to Chengdu for 2 days. Requirements: meet any one of the following:  
1. Want to try one of these restaurants: Shangzuo Cuisine Restaurant (Airport Branch)  
2. Budget for intra-city travel is 50
